questions.question: Analyze the controversy surrounding the 1876 presidential election and explain how it relates to the use of ciphers. (15 marks)
Describe the Electoral Commission's use of a cipher to count the electoral votes in the 1876 presidential election. (10 marks)
Compare and contrast the different cryptographic techniques used by Rutherford B. Hayes and Samuel J. Tilden to secure their election results in the 1876 presidential election. (20 marks)
